topic: The man my mother is dating is wearing my father's wedding ring
title: The Man My Mother Is Dating Is Wearing My Father's Wedding Ring | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My mother's new boyfriend is wearing my dead father's wedding ring.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of a man's hand resting on a kitchen table, a thin gold wedding band visible on the ring finger, the band slightly worn with a small engraving visible on the inside edge, dim kitchen ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My father died of a stroke in two thousand and nine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a framed black and white photograph on a fireplace mantel showing a middle aged man, the photo slightly faded, a small flower in a vase beside the frame, soft afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He was buried with his wedding ring. Closed casket. I was twelve.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small church chapel interior at a memorial service, empty pews, a closed wooden casket in front, a single floral arrangement, soft afternoon light through stained glass, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My mother started dating again last year.
scenes.image_prompt: interior wide shot of a kitchen at evening, two place settings on the table, a small bouquet of flowers between them, soft pendant light overhead, no people in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I met him at Easter dinner.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dining room set for a holiday meal, plates and silverware arranged on a tablecloth, a casserole dish in the center, no people, late afternoon light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Saw the ring during dessert. Same engraving.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of a hand reaching for a piece of pie on a plate, a thin gold wedding band visible on the ring finger, the inside engraving partially visible at the edge of the band, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My father had it engraved with my mother's initials and a date.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old framed wedding photograph on a wall, two figures in formal dress visible from behind, the photo slightly faded with age, ambient afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked him where he got the ring.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two coffee cups across a small kitchen table, only the corner of two place settings visible, dim ambient light, soft focus background, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He smiled. Said it was an heirloom.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a partially eaten dessert plate with a fork resting on it, ambient dining room light, the table edge visible, no person in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called my uncle the next day. He was at the burial.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a smartphone with a call screen visible showing UNCLE TOM, soft window light, the phone in a hand at chest level, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He drove to the cemetery. The grave had been disturbed.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small cemetery in late afternoon, rows of headstones visible, one specific grave in the foreground with the soil clearly disturbed, fresh dirt visible, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I told my mother. She said she already knew.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two hands clasped together across a kitchen table, one hand wearing the same gold wedding band, the other a smaller delicate band, dim evening lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
